calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerks K. Shaw/C. Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Norman Chu is present.
Saul M. Ferster representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Ricardo Delaguardia is present.
Marisa A. Deutsch representing the defendant through limited scope.
(On 8/3/07, defaults were entered against defendants Lloyd Pierson and Corey Hicks).

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, the trial date is off calendar.
